languages.text: "Какой вздор". {n}Несмотря на свои слова, Себериан все же медлит.{/n} "Ювенна и впрямь ведет себя странно последние дни... Уверен, что это все большое недоразумение. Сенешаль Войгтвир присоединится к нам, чтобы немедленно взять вас под стражу за клевету, когда мы все убедимся в вашей неправоте".

traits.locale_text: "Какой вздор". {n}Несмотря на свои слова, Себериан все же медлит.{/n} "Ювенна и впрямь ведет себя странно последние дни... Уверен, что это все большое недоразумение. Сенешаль Войгтвир присоединится к нам, чтобы немедленно взять вас под стражу за клевету, когда мы все убедимся в вашей неправоте".

languages.text: "What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."
languages.original_text: "Какой вздор". {n}Несмотря на свои слова, Себериан все же медлит.{/n} "Ювенна и впрямь ведет себя странно последние дни... Уверен, что это все большое недоразумение. Сенешаль Войгтвир присоединится к нам, чтобы немедленно взять вас под стражу за клевету, когда мы все убедимся в вашей неправоте".

traits.locale_text: "What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

"What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

"What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

languages.text: "Das ist doch Unsinn." {n}Trotz seiner Worte zögert Seberian noch immer.{/n} "Juvenna hat sich in den letzten Tagen tatsächlich seltsam verhalten ... Ich bin sicher, das ist alles ein großes Missverständnis. Truchsessin Voigtvir wird sich uns anschließen, damit sie Euch umgehend wegen Verleumdung verhaften kann, sobald wir alle gesehen haben, dass Ihr Euch irrt."
languages.original_text: "What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist doch Unsinn." {n}Trotz seiner Worte zögert Seberian noch immer.{/n} "Juvenna hat sich in den letzten Tagen tatsächlich seltsam verhalten ... Ich bin sicher, das ist alles ein großes Missverständnis. Truchsessin Voigtvir wird sich uns anschließen, damit sie Euch umgehend wegen Verleumdung verhaften kann, sobald wir alle gesehen haben, dass Ihr Euch irrt."

languages.text: “真是荒谬。”{n}虽然嘴上这么说，塞贝里安还是迟疑了一下。{/n}“尤文娜这几天确实有些反常……但这绝对是个误会。等维特威尔总领过来，我们会证明你错了，到时她将立刻以诽谤罪逮捕你。”
languages.original_text: "What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

traits.locale_text: “真是荒谬。”{n}虽然嘴上这么说，塞贝里安还是迟疑了一下。{/n}“尤文娜这几天确实有些反常……但这绝对是个误会。等维特威尔总领过来，我们会证明你错了，到时她将立刻以诽谤罪逮捕你。”

languages.text: « C'est absurde. » {n}En dépit de ses paroles, Seberian hésite encore.{/n} « Il est vrai que Juvenna a agi de manière étrange ces derniers jours... Je suis certain qu'il s'agit d'un simple malentendu. La sénéchale Voigtvir se joindra à nous afin de procéder à votre arrestation pour diffamation dès que nous aurons prouvé la fausseté de vos accusations. »
languages.original_text: "What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

traits.locale_text: « C'est absurde. » {n}En dépit de ses paroles, Seberian hésite encore.{/n} « Il est vrai que Juvenna a agi de manière étrange ces derniers jours... Je suis certain qu'il s'agit d'un simple malentendu. La sénéchale Voigtvir se joindra à nous afin de procéder à votre arrestation pour diffamation dès que nous aurons prouvé la fausseté de vos accusations. »

languages.text: «Pamplinas». {n}A pesar de sus palabras, Seberian titubea.{/n} «Es verdad que Juvenna se ha estado comportando de un modo extraño estos días... pero estoy seguro de que todo esto no es más que un malentendido. La senescal Voigtvir se unirá a nosotros para detenerle en el acto por semejante calumnia cuando hayamos demostrado que se equivoca».
languages.original_text: "What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

traits.locale_text: «Pamplinas». {n}A pesar de sus palabras, Seberian titubea.{/n} «Es verdad que Juvenna se ha estado comportando de un modo extraño estos días... pero estoy seguro de que todo esto no es más que un malentendido. La senescal Voigtvir se unirá a nosotros para detenerle en el acto por semejante calumnia cuando hayamos demostrado que se equivoca».

languages.text: "Saçmalık." {n}Sözlerine rağmen Seberian hâlâ tereddüt ediyor.{/n} "Juvenna gerçekten de son birkaç gündür garip davranıyor... Eminim hepsi büyük bir yanlış anlaşılmadır. Hepimiz yanıldığını gördükten sonra seni derhâl iftiradan tutuklayabilmesi için Seneşal Voigtvir bize katılacak."
languages.original_text: "What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

traits.locale_text: "Saçmalık." {n}Sözlerine rağmen Seberian hâlâ tereddüt ediyor.{/n} "Juvenna gerçekten de son birkaç gündür garip davranıyor... Eminim hepsi büyük bir yanlış anlaşılmadır. Hepimiz yanıldığını gördükten sonra seni derhâl iftiradan tutuklayabilmesi için Seneşal Voigtvir bize katılacak."

languages.text: 「何を言っているんだ」{n}、セベリアンはそれでもためらう。{/n} 「ユベナはここ数日、確かに変だった。これは大きな誤解だ。ヴォイグヴィル執事と共に、君が間違っていることを皆で確認したら、すぐに誹謗中傷で逮捕する」
languages.original_text: "What nonsense." {n}Despite his words, Seberian still hesitates.{/n} "Juvenna has indeed been acting strangely these past few days... I am certain it's all a big misunderstanding. Seneschal Voigtvir will join us so that she may immediately arrest you for slander once we have all seen you proven wrong."

traits.locale_text: 「何を言っているんだ」{n}、セベリアンはそれでもためらう。{/n} 「ユベナはここ数日、確かに変だった。これは大きな誤解だ。ヴォイグヴィル執事と共に、君が間違っていることを皆で確認したら、すぐに誹謗中傷で逮捕する」
